result: That’s a big question! If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that everyone has the ability and opportunity to understand one another deeply—across cultures, backgrounds, and beliefs. With greater empathy and understanding, people could cooperate more effectively, resolve conflicts peacefully, and build a kinder, more innovative, and more equitable world. Communication and compassion are powerful forces for positive change!
